title: Prolactin result review
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports recording serum prolactin result context, repeat or macroprolactin context when clinician-selected and symptoms relevant to an elevated result.

source.title: Diagnosis and Treatment of Hyperprolactinemia: An Endocrine Society Clinical Practice Guideline
source.jurisdiction: International specialty guideline; UAE laboratory, prescribing, imaging and referral policy governs local use
source.population: Nonpregnant and pregnant people with elevated prolactin, suspected medication-related hyperprolactinaemia or prolactinoma-related context.
source.setting: Endocrine evaluation of an elevated prolactin result and longitudinal specialist review.
source.exclusions: Exact for confirming result context, reviewing physiological, medicine, renal, thyroid and pituitary causes, selected imaging context and clinician follow-up. It does not infer a cause or authorise treatment.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports recording serum prolactin result context, repeat or macroprolactin context when clinician-selected and symptoms relevant to an elevated result.
